title: Chewy Midnight Vietnamese Tofu Lasagne
description: A midnight craving dish featuring chewy tofu lasagne sheets, marinated in tangy spices and served as a whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Select firm tofu for best results.

ingredients.name: Marinade
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1 tablespoon fish sauce, juice of half a lime, and chopped fresh herbs

ingredients.name: Veggies for Crumbs (optional)
ingredients.amount: 2 handfuls of mixed vegetables finely diced or thinly sliced

instructions: Drain and squeeze excess water from tofu, pat dry with paper towels.
Mix marinade ingredients in a bowl. Season lightly with salt and pepper if needed. Gently fold tofu into the marinade for at least an hour or refrigerate overnight to infuse flavors.
If using vegetables for crumbs, mix finely with Bakuchiol Oil until crumbly and slightly golden in color. Set aside.
Place tofu sheets on a baking sheet and press lightly with the veggie crumbles if adding. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 8-10 minutes or until crispy.
Meanwhile, prepare a simple sauce by mixing equal parts of water and vinegar, add a pinch of sugar to balance flavors, and set aside.
Layer tofu lasagne sheets with sauce, crumbled veggies if using, and more layers of tofu slices. Finish with a drizzle of the sauce mixture over top of each layer in the oven-safe dish.
Bake for about 25 minutes until filling is hot and cheese is bubbly golden. Serve immediately to enjoy its midnight-craving vibes.
